svg.text: RGB Mod — KV-21FS140 — Inject via CN004/CN701
74HCT4053 triple 2:1 mux — inject at A Board CN004 / C Board CN701
Notes: Cut CN004↔CN701 cable. Insert mod board in series. MUX selects RGB source vs A Board TV signal per-channel.
Ron(74HCT4053)≈80–120Ω — attenuation ~6% with 1.7kΩ load (R752+R757 on C Board). Acceptable.
⚠ HV safety: discharge CRT anode (25kV) with 10MΩ 2W resistor before working inside chassis.
